Table of Contents

Enum esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseDistributed.dll

WFSServer return message codes.

[Guid("F131682A-913D-4A2E-8B31-F0E026A2A677")]
public enum esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum

Fields

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConflictDetected = 92026

92026: The server failed to process the transaction because it unexpectedly found a conflict.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConstructEnded = 92015

92015: The construction of the WFS ended.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConstructStart = 92010

92010: The construction of the WFS started.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_Debug = 92008

92008: A generic code for WFS debug messages.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalid10AxisOrder = 92016

92016: Invalid AxisOrderWFS10 value in configuration.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalid11AxisOrder = 92017

92017: Invalid AxisOrderWFS11 value in configuration.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidAppSchemaNamespace = 92011

92011: Invalid application schema namespace in the WFS configuration.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidAppSchemaPrefix = 92012

92012: Invalid application schema prefix in the WFS configuration.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidDefaultLockExpiration = 92013

92013: Invalid default lock expiration value in the WFS configuratioln

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidUseSRSNameFormat = 92018

92018: Invalid DetermineAxisOrderFromSRSNameFormat value in configuration.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorPublishedWorkspaceIsntVersioned = 92014

92014: Transactions are enabled but the published workspace isn't versioned.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedCreatingTransactionResponse = 92023

92023: The server succeeded processing the transaction, but failed to generate the transaction response.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToDeleteLock = 92002

92002: Failed to delete lock after processing a transaction.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToDeleteOutstandingTransactionVersions = 92003

92003: Failed to delete temporary versions created to process a transaction.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToGenerateTransactionResponse = 92001

92001: Failed to generate the transaction response for a transaction that succeeded.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToImportTransactionChanges = 92022

92022: The server failed to import the changes in the WFS transaction.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToReconcileAgainstSelf = 92019

92019: The server failed to process the transaction due to a failure reconciling the published version against itself.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToReleaseLocks = 92009

92009: Feature locks failed to be released (they will eventually timeout).

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToStartEditing = 92025

92025: The server failed to process the transaction because it was unable to start editing or start an edit operation.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToStopEditing = 92020

92020: The server failed to process the transaction due to a failure when it stopped editing.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_GetRequest = 92005

92005: The http GET request about to be processed.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_NotLicensed = 92004

92004: WFS server is not licensed.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_PostRequest = 92006

92006: The http POST request about to be processed.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_ServerTooBusyToProcessTransaction = 92021

92021: The server failed to process the transaction because it is too busy processing other transactions.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_SkippedDataset = 92000

92000: A dataset will not be exposed by the WFS.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_TransactionFailedStoppingEditOperation = 92024

92024: The server failed to process the transaction because it was unable to stop the enclosing edit operation.

esriWFSServerMessageCode_WFSExceptionReport = 92007

92007: The WFS exception report.
